theme_strategy: Dark Mode First. Obsidian (#0A0A0A) as the primary anchor. Pure White (#FFFFFF) for data clarity. Volt Blue (#007AFF) as the kinetic trigger. Use 'Tactical Minimalism' with 1px solid strokes instead of soft shadows.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use tracking-[0.2em] uppercase for overlines/labels.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use 'Crystal Glass' (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10) for sticky headers and booking widgets. Use 'Grid Borders' (border-collapse, border-border/40) for dense dashboard layouts.
visual_enhancers.decorations: Subtle noise overlay on marketing hero sections. NO generic full-screen gradients.

grids.marketing: Mode A (Tetris Grid). Asymmetrical wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Never fill 100% perfectly, leave breathing room.
grids.dashboard: Mode B (High Density Grid). Tight gap-4 or gap-6. Every pixel utilized, h-full on children. Cardless sharp edges.

layouts.hero: Hero image MUST have a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast. Search widget floats above.
layouts.car_listing: Progressive disclosure for filters. All-in pricing visible immediately. Sticky booking bar at the bottom for mobile.
layouts.booking_flow: Max 3-4 screen frictionless flow. Guest checkout capabilities.

motion.interactions: Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:text-white). Buttons lift slightly (-translate-y-1).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). NO transition: all.
motion.feedback: Use skeleton screens over blank spinners for loading states.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text. Ensure clear focus states (focus:ring-2).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

image_urls.description: Black Lincoln Navigator driving in the city. Layer with bg-black/40 overlay.
Silver luxury SUV on city street.
Smiling couple enjoying a road trip in a car, showing trust and lifestyle.

media.rules: Mobile height limit: max-h-[80vh]. Never use generic placeholders.

3d_libraries.usage: Use framer-motion for micro-interactions and page transitions. Complex WebGL/3D is not required unless rendering an interactive 3D car viewer.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update index.css with the exact HSL color variables provided in the design guidelines. Set the app default to Dark Mode.
Remove default App.css text-align: center rules. Always left-align structured content.
Integrate Lucide-react or Phosphor icons. Do not use emojis for icons.
Implement the 'Sticky Booking Bar' pattern for mobile: a bottom-fixed bar with Price and Book Now button.
For the Admin Dashboard, use purely functional, highly dense layouts with visible grid lines (border-collapse equivalent) and no soft shadows.
Use sonner for toasts. The component should be implemented in .js files (e.g., sonner.js), NOT .tsx.
Every button, link, and form input MUST have a data-testid.
Make sure forms use customized Shadcn components instead of native inputs.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text elements.
Use optical alignment for elements with icons.
Do not use 100% transparent backgrounds for sticky headers; always apply a blur and semi-transparent background.
